name: test-memory
description: Validation loopflow to test Observational Memory (Observer and Reflector) and agentmemory integration.

steps.task: Create an ultra-short plan of 2 tasks: 1. Generate a poem about memory. 2. Critique the poem.

body.task:
Analyze the poem from generation {loop.iteration}.

CRITICAL RULE: If the generation {loop.iteration} is 1, you MUST return status 'changes_requested' and ask to add the word 'neon' in the next iteration. If generation is 2, you MUST return status 'approved'.

Return ONLY JSON:
{
  "status": "approved" | "changes_requested",
  "summary": "your verdict"
}
